title: AN ACT RENAMING THE GAPAN ГўВЂВ” SAN FERNANDO ГўВЂВ” OLONGAPO ROAD (GSO ROAD) AS JOSE ABAD SANTOS AVENUE (JASA)

chunks.text:
H. No. 4457

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9477, May 22, 2007 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE GAPAN ГўВЂВ” SAN FERNANDO ГўВЂВ” OLONGAPO ROAD (GSO ROAD) AS JOSE ABAD SANTOS AVENUE (JASA)

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Gapan ГўВЂВ” San Fernando ГўВЂВ” Olongapo Road (GSO Road) is hereby renamed as Jose Abad Santos Avenue (JASA).

SEC. 2. All laws, decrees, orders and issuances or parts thereof inconsistent herewith are hereby repealed or modified accordingly.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

(Sgd.) MANNY VILLAR

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of the Senate

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on November 29, 2005 and February 19, 2007, respectively.

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: MAY 22 2007

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
